title: Infinispan SQL Cache Store Configuration
description: SQL cache store configuration for Infinispan.

AbstractSqlStore.description: Abstract SQL store that extends the JDBC common store.

TableJdbcStore.description: Defines a table-based SQL cache store. The SQL cache store automatically generates statements based on the database dialect to perform all operations.

table-name.description: Specifies a database table that loads entries to the cache and stores data from the cache.

QueryJdbcStore.description: Defines a query-based SQL cache store with custom SQL queries for all operations.

key-columns.description: Specifies the columns from the database table that correspond to key(s). Use commas to separate multiple columns.

Schema.description: Defines the Protobuf schema mapping for the SQL cache store.

message-name.description: Specifies the Protobuf message name to use for the value of the cache entry.

key-message-name.description: Specifies the Protobuf message name to use for the key of the cache entry.

package.description: Specifies the package for key and value message names.

embedded-key.description: Specifies if key field(s) are also part of the value schema.

Queries.description: Defines custom SQL queries for the query-based SQL cache store.

select-all.description: Defines a SQL query that bulk loads cache entries from a database.

select-single.description: Defines a SQL query that loads cache entries from a database.

delete-all.description: Defines a SQL query to clear the cache.

delete-single.description: Defines a SQL query to delete specific entries from the cache.

upsert.description: Defines a SQL query to modify entries in the cache.

size.description: Defines a SQL query to count the number of entries in the cache.
